name: pandahrms
description: Pandahrms skills for Claude Code: a manual, standalone work flow -- /discover and /discover-ticket intake, /spec (layered Gherkin behaviour spec), /slice (vertical-slice cards), /execute (guided card run with TDD and stop-gates), /status, /close, /pr -- plus quality skills (code-review, security-review, simplify, commit), safe branching, EF Core migrations, handoff-compact, and the optimise-prompt pre-flight repeat-back
